subject: Properties of Expectation
topic: §47 Covariance, Variance of Sums, and Correlations
question: Let $X$ and $Y$ be two independent random variables with densities $$f_X(x) = \begin{cases} 1 & 0<x<1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases} \qquad f_Y(y) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{2} & 0<y<2 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$$ (a) Write down the joint pdf $f_{XY}(x,y)$. (b) Let $Z = X+Y$. Find the pdf $f_Z(a)$. Simplify as much as possible. (c) Find the expectation $E(X)$ and variance $\mathrm{Var}(X)$. Repeat for $Y$. (d) Compute the expectation $E(Z)$ and the variance $\mathrm{Var}(Z)$.
